name: Spaghetti with Garlic and Oil I
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 1 cup of the cooked spaghetti water.
2. In a small skillet or saucepan, heat olive oil over low heat.
3. Add garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cook the garlic until it is lightly browned, being careful not to overcook it.
5. Remove from heat and pour over the cooked spaghetti.
6. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
7. If the pasta seems dry, add some of the reserved spaghetti water.
